Event: Magic Treasure Hunt
Event Date: 20/11/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: SC38
Court Wizard Scepter

Once every 7 sec., the unit deals magic damage to a random enemy unit and all enemy units in a large radius around the target. The damage is equal to 30% of the primary target's maximum health. Every affected unit also has a 75% chance to be frozen for 3 sec. During this time, the frozen units can't move or attack, and the cooldown time of all their gear and artifact abilities is increased by 3 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet

First trigger: 3 sec

Cooldown: 7 secs
